faults.A4EB: electrical system voltage, overvoltage or undervoltage
faults.A4F9: CAN: failure telegram status driving light
faults.A4FD: CAN: failure telegram display cluster/external display
faults.D847: CAN: Bus off or dual ported RAM
faults.D84D: Weckendes Device has 3 times unsuccessful attempted the network too wake. (Error WakeUp Failed).

faults.D851: Long and/or frequent Unlocks (Error Unlock Long).
faults.D852: On Device has itself due to overtemperature shut off (Error temperature Shutdown).
